channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Revirement chez Volkswagen : les boutons physiques font leur grand retour, c’est « non négociable »
item.description: Volkswagen fait définitivement machine arrière sur les commandes tactiles. Jugées trop peu pratiques par les utilisateurs, elles laisseront systématiquement place aux boutons physiques dans les futurs modèles.

item.title: Best Lego Gifts for Brick Builders (2026): Smart Bricks, Video Games, and More
item.description: Your kids are only kids for so long, but love and Lego sets last forever. Here are our top picks for the Lego fan in your life.

item.title: A New Implant Aims to Rewire Stroke Patients’ Brains
item.description: Epia Neuro’s brain-computer interface will include a motorized glove to help stroke patients recover movement in their hand.

item.title: Google Pixel 8a à prix cassé : voici l’astuce pour l’obtenir à seulement 179 €
item.description: Le Pixel 8a a beau ne pas être le dernier smartphone pas cher en date de Google, il a encore de belles choses à offrir. C'est un très bon photophone qui fera un bon compagnon pendant de bonnes années, le tout pour 179 euros grâce à cette offre chez Red by SFR.

item.title: 'We know exactly where we are going and exactly what we want to do' — The Division 3 senior producer suggests fans shouldn't worry about the departure of the game's executive producer, confirming its roadmap has been 'planned and secured for some time'
item.description: Ubisoft has confirmed that The Division 3's roadmap is fully planned, suggesting fans don't need to worry about the game's development following recent studio changes.

item.title: There's a sneaky way to watch The Housemaid for FREE
item.description: Here's our guide on a super simple way to stream and watch The Housemaid for free from anywhere in the world, as Sydney Sweeney's saucy thriller hits streaming services in selected countries.

item.title: Hasbro hit by major cyberattack — toymaker confirms 'unfortunate incident' takes down some parts of its websites
item.description: The business is still running but it could take weeks before the issue is fully resolved.

item.title: Our 7 Favorite Humidifiers for Home, Travel & More (2026)
item.description: From models for traveling to humidifiers that double as planters or air purifiers, we've tested a dozen of them.

item.title: KitchenAid's new premium stand mixer has one brilliant feature I didn't realize I needed in my baking
item.description: The KitchenAid Artisan Plus offers a more powerful motor, finer control, and a bowl light that lets you easily check on your ingredients.

item.title: The best deals this week, according to Mashables team of shopping experts
item.description: The best deals this week. Mashable's shoping team finds deals on AirPods, Pokémon cards, robot vacuums, and so much more.

item.title: Artemis II file vers la Lune… et ce voyant a rappelé qu’en orbite, rien n’est jamais anodin
item.description: Après un lancement spectaculaire et réussi depuis la Floride, les quatre astronautes d’Artemis II sont désormais en orbite terrestre et ont débuté leur mission historique. Après des tests de maniabilité, des problèmes de toilettes, le déploiement de satellites et une première période de repos,...

item.title: Don’t Hold Your Breath for a ‘Super Smash Bros.’ Movie
item.description: With 'The Super Mario Galaxy Movie' now in theaters, Shigeru Miyamoto has doused fans' hopes for a major Nintendo crossover.

item.title: Gas Prices Are Soaring. So Is the Demand for Used EVs
item.description: Dealerships say they’re getting busier as the Iran war and the shipping crisis at the Strait of Hormuz drag on.

item.title: I Took RFK Jr.’s Advice and Ate Nothing but High-Protein Foods for a Week
item.description: From forcing down chewy, bacon-flavored Man Cereal to vomiting at the office, buying into the MAHA protein craze was a challenging endeavor.

item.title: Uber expands its $4,000 ‘Go Electric’ grant to drivers nationwide
item.description: Since last year, Uber has been offering drivers in a handful of locations - California, Colorado, Massachusetts and New York City - $4,000 to swap their gas guzzlers for electric vehicles. The company must have liked the results because today it announced that it would be expanding eligibility for its "Go Electric" grant to drivers […]

item.title: Insider trading or random guy? It doesn’t matter to Polymarket
item.description: In mid-March, conspiracy theories swirled claiming Benjamin Netanyahu had been replaced by an AI clone. Though there was no actual proof that the Israeli Prime Minister had been injured or killed, on X this spurred a flurry of posts promoting prediction markets where people bet on whether he would be out of office by March […]

item.title: Microsoft launches 3 new AI models in direct shot at OpenAI and Google
item.description: Microsoft on Wednesday launched three new foundational AI models it built entirely in-house — a state-of-the-art speech transcription system, a voice generation engine, and an upgraded image creator — marking the most concrete evidence yet that the $3 trillion software giant intends to compete directly with OpenAI, Google, and other frontier labs on model development, not just distribution.The trio of models — MAI-Transcribe-1, MAI-Voice-1, and MAI-Image-2 — are available immediately through Microsoft Foundry and a new MAI Playground. They span three of the most commercially valuable modalitie...

item.title: Finally, a wearable designed for women approaching menopause
item.description: Peri tracks hot flashes, night sweats, anxiety, and more for women in perimenopause. How it works, why its founders decided to sell it as a consumer device, and Peri’s surprising business model. Ali Hewson, like many women, was unprepared for the intensity of perimenopause. “I initially thought I would just grin and bear it, as my mother did,” she says. ...

item.title: Cette nouvelle tente de toit Thule Widesky transforme votre voiture en véritable salon
item.description: Oubliez l'installation laborieuse et les tentes étouffantes. Thule redéfinit le camping automobile avec la Widesky, une tente de toit ultra-compacte qui se déploie en quelques secondes à l'aide de vérins. Son point fort ? Un aménagement intérieur inédit conçu pour s'y détendre même en pleine journée.

item.title: Stephen Colbert reacts to the Artemis II moon mission
item.description: Stephen Colbert has reacted to NASA's Artemis II moon mission, which launched on Wednesday.

item.title: Maintaining cyber control when AI can act autonomously
item.description: The critical question is what AI agents are authorized to do: how they trigger workflows, execute tasks and operate within delegated permissions.

item.title: 'Time to unsubscribe' — Netflix made a big change to its Apple TV app, removing a ton of useful functions
item.description: Some Apple TV owners are unhappy with Netflix's updated app, which drops the tvOS player and some of its features

item.title: The Daily Show reacts to judge halting Trumps White House ballroom
item.description: After demolishing the White House's East Wing, Donald Trump's $400 million ballroom has hit a wall. "The Daily Show" host Desi Lydic takes a look.

item.title: OpenAI doesn’t just want to answer your questions — it wants to run your digital life
item.description: OpenAI’s new roadmap reveals a major shift from chat-based AI toward a unified system designed to act on user intent and handle real tasks

item.title: La Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 perd 150 € : c’est le moment de craquer pour l’une des montres les plus fines du marché
item.description: Avec sa Samsung Galaxy Watch 8, Samsung a pensé aux sportifs en modifiant le système GPS de sa montre pour des mesures plus précises. Une nouveauté à découvrir pour 224,99 euros chez PC Componentes au lieu de 379 euros.

item.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 headphones are half price right now at Amazon — save over $200
item.description: As of April 2, the Sennheiser Momentum 4 headphones are on sale for $226.37 at Amazon, 50% off their list price of $449.95.

item.title: Momentum Vida E+ Electric Bike Review: Stable, Quality Ride
item.description: Momentum’s latest electric commuter bike feels luxurious and natural to ride. It’s also heavy.

item.title: Apple iPad Air (M4) Review: The Ultimate iPad
item.description: The M4 iPad Air is a very modest refresh, but let’s not forget just how good of an iPad it really is.

item.title: 'Spending more on AI is not the same as creating value': New study claims firms are ready to spend big on AI, but are afraid to take the first step
item.description: Companies are committed to investing in AI, but they need to address workforces, security and data first, study finds.

item.title: Why are designers, engineers, and product managers in a ‘three-way standoff’?
item.description: New data has the design community in a debate about the future of their jobs. A newsletter about the state of the product job market recently went viral in the design corner of the internet. It’s exposing a widespread debate about whether the role of the designer is narrowing in the age of AI.

item.title: Les images spectaculaires du décollage d’Artemis II filmées depuis un avion
item.description: Le lancement de la mission Artemis II vers la Lune a offert un spectacle saisissant à quelques chanceux. Des passagers d'un vol commercial survolant la Floride ont pu filmer l'ascension fulgurante de la fusée spatiale depuis le hublot de leur appareil. Cette séquence rarissime partagée sur les réseaux sociaux dévoile la puissance du lanceur américain sous un angle totalement inédit....

item.title: Lego has dropped a World Cup collection featuring Messi and Ronaldo: Here’s where to pre-order now
item.description: Lego is teaming up with Cristiano Ronaldo, Kylian Mbappé, Lionel Messi, and Vini Jr. to celebrate the 2026 World Cup. Where to buy now.

item.title: Même dans l’espace, les astronautes d’Artemis II galèrent avec Microsoft Outlook
item.description: La mission spatiale américaine a décollé avec succès en 2026, propulsant quatre astronautes vers la Lune. Mais si l'immense fusée SLS a fonctionné avec la précision d'une horloge suisse, l'équipage doit aujourd'hui faire face à un problème informatique bien plus terrestre : un bug logiciel. Une situation cocasse qui prouve que l'espace n'échappe décidément pas aux petits tracas de la bureautique moderne. ...

item.title: Nouveau Kia EV2 : la raison absurde qui pourrait le priver de sa meilleure version en France
item.description: Dévoilé en début d’année 2026, le nouveau Kia EV2 prend la forme d’une voiture électrique compacte très intéressante. Mais si le SUV se décline en une version quatre places très pratique, elle pourrait ne pas être vendue en Europe, pour une raison étonnante.

item.title: The Division Resurgence developer says they're 'very satisfied with the touch controls' of the 'more tactical' game
item.description: Tom Clancy's The Division Resurgence executive producer Fabrice Navrez is "very satisfied" with the mobile game's touch controls, but says players can choose to play with a controller if they prefer.

item.title: La fin des smartphones pas chers : les augmentations de prix se multiplient
item.description: Boom de l'IA, tensions géopolitiques et pénuries de composants poussent les constructeurs de smartphones à augmenter massivement leurs tarifs. La hausse pourrait aller jusqu'à 25 % dès le printemps 2026, et pas que sur les nouveaux modèles.

item.title: Semi-conducteurs : Huawei, grand gagnant des sanctions américaines et du recul de Nvidia en Chine
item.description: Le géant chinois détient désormais 20 % du marché des semi-conducteurs dans le pays, selon des chiffres de 2025 publiés par le cabinet d'études IDC.

item.title: I thought the LG Gram Book could be the perfect sensibly-priced laptop for work or school - and boy, I was wrong
item.description: The LG Gram Book is a reasonably competent middle-of-the-road laptop, good for students or office workers, but it simply doesn't do enough to justify its midrange price tag.

item.title: What’s Actually the Best Way to Get a Good Night’s Sleep? We Asked Scientists
item.description: From getting plenty of daylight to avoiding late night caffeine runs, here are some expert-backed tips on how to doze off more easily.

item.title: Rethinking Zero Trust in the Age of Digital Warfare
item.description: Why defense agencies must go beyond Zero Trust to share intelligence at mission speed.

item.title: Unmasking the Paramilitary Agents Behind Trump’s Violent Immigration Crackdown
item.description: A WIRED analysis of DHS records identified dozens of specialized federal agents who used force against US civilians during the largest known deployment of its kind in US history.

item.title: A 90-year-old audio brand just put out its most affordable speakers yet — and the specs look very tasty indeed
item.description: Leak has unveiled the Sandwich 100, a more compact and affordable Hi-Fi speaker for the rest of us.

item.title: The unexpected childhood activity that predicted my career path
item.description: The thing that I used to role-play became how I’ve made my living. “And a cascade of lace here, here, and here.” I thwacked my pen against the notepad to emphasize each word while my cousin nodded vigorously. At 8 and 10, we carefully reviewed our wedding dress designs as if our big days were just moments away. While our parents prepped dinner, we rehearsed our grand bridal entry in painstaking detail....

item.title: Tostitos redesigned its bags to emphasize one obvious thing
item.description: The biggest tortilla chip brand in the world wants you to remember where its chips come from. Last year, PepsiCo started printing real potatoes onto every bag of Lay’s. The reason? In a world where people are increasingly concerned about the provenance of their food, 42% of the population didn’t realize that the world’s most popular potato chip was made from potatoes. ...

item.title: How Disney Imagineers are using AI and robotics to reshape the company’s theme parks
item.description: From robotic Olaf to reinforcement learning, the company is rethinking how its attractions come to life. With last weekend’s opening of World of Frozen in the renamed Disney Adventure World park, Paris became the new leader in advanced technology among the company’s theme parks. It’s a title that shifts hands frequently, but with its robotic Olaf and a new nighttime show that blends airborne and water drones with fountains, fire, and water walls, Adventure World is a technological marvel....

item.title: Que sait-on de la potentielle PS6 portable ? Ces indices suggèrent des performances passables
item.description: Un leaker bien connu a déniché cette semaine de nouvelles informations concernant les performances de la potentielle PlayStation 6 Portable. Cette dernière réussirait notamment à battre la Xbox Series S... une console qui fêtera bientôt son sixième anniversaire.

item.title: Le plan XXL de BYD pour inonder le marché mondial avec 1,5 million de voitures en 2026
item.description: BYD prévoit d’exporter pas moins de 1,5 million de voitures électriques et hybrides dans le monde entier en 2026. Un chiffre en hausse de 15 % par rapport à ce qui avait initialement été annoncé.

item.title: Créateurs, Gamers, IA : pourquoi les SSD Samsung T9 et 9100 PRO sont incontournables ? [Sponso]
item.description: La RAM explose, mais l'espace de stockage reste, lui, encore abordable. C'est ce que prouve Samsung avec deux SSD disponibles à partir de 189,99 euros, pensés au choix pour un usage nomade, ou pour booster votre PC fixe.
